name: Oriental Spicy Orange Beef
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Beef flank or round steak
recipeInstructions:
1. In a wok over medium heat, add oil.
2. Add meat 1/3 at a time and stir fry for 3 minutes or until browned.
3. Return all the beef to the wok.
4. Add orange peel, garlic, and ginger; stir fry for 1 minute.
5. Stir together corn starch, beef broth, soy sauce, sherry, marmalade, and pepper in a separate bowl.
6. Pour the mixture over the beef and stir constantly.
7. Bring to a boil over medium heat for 1 minute.
8. Serve over rice. Serves 4.
